SPESTG-1054 Add Function App Key Vault access and DIA runtime settings

Summary:
- Added Key Vault Secrets User role assignment for the Function App managed identity so Key Vault references can resolve in Test/UAT.
- Added DIA exception notification app settings required by the Function App runtime:
  - DiaExceptionNotification__SenderConfigKey
  - DiaExceptionNotification__RecipientConfigKey

Validation:
- Validated Test pipeline rerun with the Key Vault role assignment.
- Confirmed Test Key Vault references still resolve after Function App restart.
- Dev remains unaffected.
- Dev/Test validation will be rerun after the DIA notification app settings update.
